stemHtml: Which of the following is correct regarding a flight operated without cabin crew?

options.a: The commander must ensure that every passenger knows the location and operation of the emergency exits.
options.b: The commander must ensure that one able-bodied passenger knows where the emergency exits are.
options.c: The commander does NOT need to inform passengers of the location of the emergency exits.
options.d: The commander does NOT need to provide a passenger briefing if no cabin crew are carried.
